## What does this change

A short summary of the behavior change.

## Why

Link the Issue or describe the motivating use case.

## How I tested

- [ ] `python -m py_compile Capacitra.pyw` passes
- [ ] Ran through the affected panel(s) manually on Windows 10 / 11
- [ ] The GitHub Actions build workflow is green
- [ ] No new external dependencies

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `SECURITY.md` if threat model changed
- [ ] The change respects Capacitra's constraints
      (no telemetry, no hard-delete, no cross-platform port sneak-in)
